description_long: This warehouse is a large, rectangular industrial building with a flat, dark roof and a smaller attached annex featuring a green roof. The main structure is predominantly white with rows of evenly spaced rectangular windows along the longer facades, providing natural light to the interior. The annex, set to one side, is slightly lower in height and also features a series of small windows, suggesting office or utility space. The building sits on a broad, gray paved base, likely representing a loading or parking area. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible decorative elements or signage. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or masonry, with metal or composite roofing.
description: A large, white industrial warehouse with a flat dark roof and a smaller green-roofed annex, featuring rows of rectangular windows and a broad paved base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with multiple windows and the attached green-roofed annex on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the main building and the full profile of the annex with its windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expanse of the flat dark roof and the annex set to one side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the annex in the foreground and the main building extending behind it.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a series of evenly spaced rectangular windows set in a plain white wall, with a smaller annex to one side that also includes a row of windows. The exterior is unadorned, emphasizing function over decoration, and the entryway is implied but not visibly detailed.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is flat and dark, likely constructed from metal or composite panels, with no visible skylights, HVAC units, or other rooftop features. The annex has a contrasting green flat roof.
